title: Tutorial screen to Onboarding screen
scenario: Tutorial screen navigation to Onboarding screen displays correct start page with proper image and text per Figma design
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. If the app is opened for the first time, the Tutorial screen will appear. Swipe through the Tutorial screens until the final screen.
3. On the final Tutorial screen, tap the "Get Started" or "Next" button to navigate to the Onboarding screen.
4. Observe the Onboarding screen that appears.
5. Compare the displayed image and text on the Onboarding screen against the Figma design specifications.
expected: The Onboarding screen displays the correct start Onboarding page with the proper image and text as specified in the Figma design.
